feedback.text: I greatly support the Digital Fairness Act as I believe that digital space is becoming increasingly unfair for the average consumer. I would also like to raise the issue of unfair practices in the video game industry, such as ones raised by the EU citizen iniaitive "Stop Destroying Videogames" where video games are made unplayable by publishers even though the game has been purchased and should be owned by the user. I would extremely appreciate if unfair practices in the video game industry will also be addressed in the Digital Fairness Act.
